rootCauses.description: Compound problem with three sub-issues: word-order mismatch (MARC stores surname-first, query compiler generates given-name-first), cross-script mismatch (some agents exist only in Hebrew script with no alias bridge), and publisher synonym mismatch (modern English names vs Latin MARC forms with EQUALS instead of CONTAINS).

The narrative agent produces biographical paragraphs from Wikidata enrichment but does not connect agents across records, identify intellectual networks, or explain the significance of a result set in its historical context.

The aggregation engine in scripts/chat/aggregation.py is fully implemented for Phase 2 but analytical questions arriving during Phase 1 are classified as retrieval queries, returning all records with no aggregation. The capability exists but is not routed correctly.

rootCauses.impact: Narrative exists but lacks scholarly depth
rootCauses.description: The narrative agent produces template-based biographical paragraphs but lacks thematic context about printing history, intellectual movements, and bibliographic significance needed for scholarly use.
The system cannot compare result sets side-by-side (e.g., Venice vs Amsterdam printing, Bragadin vs rival Venetian presses) to provide contextual analysis.

The _MAX_RESULT_SET = 100 threshold in narrative_agent.py causes the narrative agent to return None for result sets above 100 records. For Q14 (2796), Q15 (806), and Q20 (120), no narrative is generated at all.

The system has no selection/recommendation capability. It returns large result sets but cannot identify the most historically significant, visually striking, or narratively compelling items for an exhibit.

implementationTasks.title: Create agent_aliases table
implementationTasks.description: Schema: (alias_id, authority_id, variant_form, script, source, confidence). Populate from existing authority_enrichment table (Wikidata labels, Hebrew labels). Add manual entries for known gaps: Johann Buxtorf, Moses Mendelssohn, Joseph Karo.

implementationTasks.title: Implement order-insensitive agent matching
implementationTasks.description: Modify normalize_filter_value() in scripts/query/db_adapter.py. Split agent name into tokens, sort alphabetically, rejoin for comparison. Apply same normalization to DB values.

implementationTasks.title: Modify build_where_clause() for alias lookup
implementationTasks.description: In scripts/query/db_adapter.py, AGENT_NORM handler. Add subquery: OR a.authority_uri IN (SELECT authority_id FROM agent_aliases WHERE LOWER(variant_form) LIKE ...). This allows cross-script and cross-form matching.

implementationTasks.title: Populate alias table from enrichment data
implementationTasks.description: Script: scripts/metadata/build_agent_aliases.py. Sources: authority_enrichment.label, authority_enrichment.person_info (hebrew_label field). Generate surname-first and given-name-first variants automatically.

implementationTasks.title: Add analytical query detection to intent agent
implementationTasks.description: Modify scripts/chat/intent_agent.py. Add new intent type: ANALYTICAL alongside existing QUERY_DEFINITION. Pattern detection keywords: distribution, chronological shape, printing centers, how many by decade, geographic breakdown, most common, overview of.

implementationTasks.title: Route analytical queries to aggregation in Phase 1
implementationTasks.description: Modify handle_query_definition_phase() in app/api/main.py. After intent classification, if analytical: execute full-collection aggregation via execute_aggregation() from scripts/chat/aggregation.py. Skip candidate set return for pure analytical queries.

implementationTasks.title: Add collection-level aggregation endpoints
implementationTasks.description: Modify scripts/chat/aggregation.py to accept record_ids=None as 'all records'. Currently requires explicit record ID list; add path for full-table aggregation with faster SQL (no IN clause).

implementationTasks.title: Raise or contextualize narrative agent threshold
implementationTasks.description: In scripts/chat/narrative_agent.py: _MAX_RESULT_SET = 100. For analytical queries, generate a statistical summary instead of per-agent bios. New function: generate_analytical_summary().

implementationTasks.title: Build relationship extraction from enrichment data
implementationTasks.description: New module: scripts/chat/cross_reference.py. Query authority_enrichment.person_info for teacher/student/notable_works relationships. Build in-memory graph of agent relationships within a result set. Function: find_connections(record_ids, db_path) -> List[Connection].

implementationTasks.title: Add comparison query support
implementationTasks.description: Modify scripts/chat/exploration_agent.py to handle COMPARISON intent. Function: execute_comparison() in scripts/chat/aggregation.py. Input: two sets of filters. Output: side-by-side facet comparison (dates, languages, publishers, agents).

implementationTasks.title: Integrate cross-references into narrative agent
implementationTasks.description: Modify generate_agent_narrative() in scripts/chat/narrative_agent.py. After generating individual bios, call find_connections(). Append a Connections section using PersonInfo.teachers and PersonInfo.students fields.

implementationTasks.title: Add 'compare with' follow-up suggestion
implementationTasks.description: In scripts/chat/formatter.py, generate_followups(). For place-filtered results, suggest 'Compare with [other major center]'. For agent results, suggest 'Show related authors'.

implementationTasks.title: Create thematic context templates
implementationTasks.description: New module: scripts/chat/thematic_context.py. Pre-authored context paragraphs for major themes: Venetian Hebrew printing and censorship, Amsterdam as Dutch Jerusalem, Christian Hebraism, Haskalah, Incunabula, Talmud printing controversies. Each template keyed by (subject, place, date_range) tuples.

implementationTasks.title: Integrate thematic context into response formatting
implementationTasks.description: Modify handle_query_definition_phase() in app/api/main.py. After query execution, call get_thematic_context() with query plan filters. Append thematic paragraph after agent narrative, labeled as [Historical Context].

implementationTasks.title: Add significance scoring for records
implementationTasks.description: New function in scripts/chat/narrative_agent.py. Score records by: agent enrichment richness, date (earlier = more significant), place rarity, edition number (first editions). Surface top-3 notable items in response.

implementationTasks.title: Enhance pedagogical framing
implementationTasks.description: In scripts/chat/formatter.py, add pedagogical wrappers. Teaching notes and further reading suggestions triggered when query matches a known teaching topic.

implementationTasks.title: Build significance scoring model
implementationTasks.description: New module: scripts/chat/curator.py. Multi-factor scoring: date rarity (pre-1500 = high), enrichment data richness, provenance indicators, place rarity, first edition markers, illustration indicators. Function: score_candidates(candidates, db_path) -> List[ScoredCandidate].

implementationTasks.title: Add curation intent to exploration agent
implementationTasks.description: Modify scripts/chat/exploration_agent.py. Handle RECOMMENDATION intent type (already stubbed but not implemented). Parse user request: select 10 for exhibit, most important items, representative sample.

implementationTasks.title: Implement diverse selection algorithm
implementationTasks.description: In scripts/chat/curator.py. Select top-N items maximizing both significance and diversity. Diversity dimensions: date spread, place spread, language spread, agent spread. Greedy selection algorithm.

implementationTasks.title: Format curated selection as exhibit narrative
implementationTasks.description: In scripts/chat/formatter.py. Format as exhibit narrative with title, numbered items with date/place/title/significance note, and one-sentence curatorial note for each item.

questionDetails.query: books printed by Bragadin press in Venice
Hebrew books printed in Amsterdam between 1620 and 1650
questionDetails.filtersApplied: place EQUALS "amsterdam", language EQUALS "heb", year RANGE 1620-1650

questionDetails.query: books published by the Aldine Press
incunabula in the collection (books printed before 1500)
materials about Ethiopia or Ethiopian Jews
books about book collecting or bibliography
curated selection for Hebrew printing exhibit
